examples: Entering the realm of Nirvana is only possible for those who have become pure.
Many businessmen think that a world where relative prices never varied would be nirvana.
I can see many a City trader finding Nirvana there.
Meanwhile all parties continue negotiating the measured path towards the nirvana of truly open all-product trade.
The points--100 denoting nirvana--are awarded by reviewers at Wine Spectator, Wine Advocate and other oenophilic publications.
